name: agentcrdt

customCommands.name: explain
customCommands.prompt: Explain how this part of agentcrdt works: {input}. Use the module map in AGENTS.md as context.
customCommands.description: Explain a part of the codebase

rules: This is agentcrdt — Semantic-causal CRDT for agent-mutable world state.
Library code must not use print() — use rich.console.Console.
All public API must have type annotations and docstrings.
Tests use pytest. CLI tests use click.testing.CliRunner.
